author: Nicholas of Blonye (of Plove or Plone)(†ca. 1437)
title: Tractatus sacerdotalis de sacramentis deque divinis officiis et eorum administrationibus, De horis canonicis
remarks: Kraków, Biblioteka Jagiellońska, Ms 2600; comissioned by the bishop of Poznan for the use of his diocese. 'A comprehensive guide to pastoral care and the sacraments.'  The predecessor bishop of the diocese was a famous reformer, Andrzej Łaskarz. // Estreicher speaks of 36 editions
order_rank: Master of decretals, royal chaplain, chaplain of fratrum nostrorum capituli Poznań
